use_cases: Select date ranges for booking appointments or reservations
Filter data reports and analytics by custom date periods
Schedule events across multiple days with visual range indication
Choose check-in and check-out dates for travel or accommodations
Set time-bound criteria in forms like report generation or data exports
ai_summary: A calendar component with range selection capability from shadcn/ui, allowing users to visually select a span of dates for booking, scheduling, or filtering purposes. Built with Radix UI primitives for accessibility, featuring hover states on individual dates and visual highlighting of selected date ranges.
